title: vicia iberica
intro: Vicia iberica, also known as winter vetch or Spanish vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vicia iberica are attributed to its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood sugar levels, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Vicia iberica is traditionally prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies to support digestive health and reduce stress.
